package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessSelectStarOnHotQuery() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_database_access_select_star_on_hot_query"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Database access. Flag SELECT * in hot queries where narrow projections reduce scan and decode cost."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
